full_text:
Cui Liang 崔諒
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cui Liang (崔諒). Governor of Anding, tried to lure Shu army into trap but was killed by Zhang Bao. Cui Liang is a fictional character. Cui Liang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cui Liang lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
